phaseHistory.notes: Monorepo scaffolded; Phase 0 foundations + Phase 1 free tool + initial paid flow / send-infra / outbound agents shipped in iteration 1.

Iteration 2: Phase 5 programmatic SEO (10 entries + sitemap + robots), Phase 6 refund flow (Stripe webhook + ops API + Inngest fn), 4 new Inngest functions (support, outbound, sendBatch, refund) wired into allFunctions, +26 tests (now 52 passing). Typecheck clean across all 6 workspaces.
